svg.title: NeTEx Nordic: Line file vs Shared file object references
svg.desc: Diagram showing how objects in a line-specific file reference objects in the shared file. JourneyPattern and PassengerStopAssignment both reference ScheduledStopPoint independently.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om Line i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om JourneyPattern i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om ServiceJourney i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om DatedServiceJourney i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om ScheduledStopPoint i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om PassengerStopAssignment i NeTEx Nordic')
sendPrompt('Fortell meg mer om OperatingDay i NeTEx Nordic')
